Which caption best describes this video?
A. Someone using their right and left hand to hold to a screwdriver, They remove the left and then just use the right to remove a screen from the base of a light bulb. A person grabs a black wire with their right hand and a fixture that looks like a light fixture with their left hand and pushes the black wire onto the gold connector on the back of the fixture. The person pulls the string with the left hand and switches on the bulb. The person holds the screwdriver in the right hand and tightens the screw while holding the socket with the left hand.
B. Someone using their right and left hand to hold to a screwdriver, They remove the left and then just use the right to remove a screen from the base of a light bulb. A person grabs a black wire with their right hand and a fixture that looks like a light fixture with their left hand and pushes the black wire onto the gold connector on the back of the fixture. The person holds the screwdriver in the right hand and tightens the screw while holding the socket with the left hand. The person pulls the string with the left hand and switches on the bulb.
Answer with the option's letter from the given choices directly.

Which caption best describes this video?
A. A few pieces of meat are being grilled over a charcoal pit on skewers. The camera zooms in onto a part of the skewer. Smoke is coming up from the coals and the meat cooks and its fat and juices fall into the coal. The edges of the meat begin to crisp up. Someone is holding meat in the right hand and slowly turning it so you can see the cooked product. Then, removing some meat on a metal skewer from over an open flame grill. A still picture of the meat in a plate is shown.

Which caption best describes this video?
A. The text 'lemon' appeared and disappeared. With the left hand holding the lemon at the top, the right hand holding a knife cuts the lemon into four quarters. Holding a halved lemon in his left hand, he extracts its juice in a bowl by twisting a reamer in his right hand.  The person turns the citrus reamer counter clockwise with the right hand and turns the lemon in the left hand clockwise to wring out the juice into the bowl. The person pours the lemon juice into the larger bowl. The person lifts the lid of the box and takes out a pinch of saffron with the right hand. The person lifts the pestle with the right hand and holds the saffron over the mortar with the left hand.
B. The text "lemon" appeared and disappeared. With the left hand holding the lemon at the top, the right hand holding a knife cuts the lemon into two halves.
